title: International Registered Students
content:
International Registered Students

Okan Homepage

Academic

MENU

As a university student you have to fulfil all academic requirements in order to obtain the qualification that you are aiming at.Turkish Higher Education System is a credit based education. Undergraduate students should succeed in 240 ECTS credits for a Bachelor Degree in all disciplines apart from Medicine and Dentistry.

To become Medical Doctor (MD) students should complete 360 ECTS credits and 300 ECTS credits for obtaining a degree in Dentistry.

There are special rules and regulations for medical and dental studies.

Please click the link if you are a medical student
